text:
1099s are generated only when your account crosses the IRS reporting threshold for the year. If you didn't receive one, it means your 2025 activity fell below that threshold.

Check the Documents section in the app first — if a 1099 was issued to you, it'll be there. If you don't see it and believe you should have one, or if you need us to resend it, reply with your account email and our ops team will confirm your status and resend if applicable.

Novig Support
